## Term Name
[Exactly as it should appear in the glossary]

## Proposed Definition
[Your 3–6 sentence definition. Include why a practitioner needs to know this.]

## Why It Matters
[Practical consequence: How does understanding this term change how someone builds or operates AI systems?]

## Citations or Sources
[Where have you encountered this term? Papers, framework docs, industry usage? Include links if available.]

## Related Terms
[Are there existing glossary entries this relates to? How is this term distinct?]

[Anything else we should know?]
